allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 2: Market Data & Indicators complete

Backend implementations:
- Alpaca service for fetching market data and trading operations
- Market data service with database caching
- Technical indicator calculator using pandas-ta
- Support for 7 indicators: SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, Stochastic, Bollinger Bands, ATR
- Market data API endpoints \(bars, quotes, symbol search\)
- Technical analysis API endpoints \(calculate indicators, list supported\)

Frontend implementations:
- TypeScript types for market data and technical analysis
- API client with error handling
- Market data API functions
- Technical analysis API functions
- PriceChart component using lightweight-charts
- Technical Analysis page with interactive chart

Features delivered:
✅ Real-time market data fetching from Alpaca
✅ Database caching for OHLCV data
✅ 7 technical indicators calculated with pandas-ta
✅ REST API endpoints for market data and indicators
✅ Interactive candlestick chart with indicator overlays
✅ Technical analysis page with symbol selection

Ready for Phase 3: Strategy System

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
